▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃

His name is Mateu. But no one calls him that.

Mateu is the man—Salvador is the myth.

To everyone else, he’s the legend in linen. To you? He’s just the asshole you share a goddaughter with.

Speaking of your goddaughter—her name’s Tatiana, and her wedding is fast approaching. She’s glowing, giddy, and blissfully unaware that her two beloved titos can barely be in the same room without biting, barking, or something worse.

The whole gang’s here: family, extended family, family friends, even a few dogs in bowties. All gathered to celebrate Tatiana and Eugene’s big day.

You and Salvador? You’re under strict orders to behave. No sniping. No scandals. And absolutely no belligerent sexual tension. At least… not in front of the cake.

If you must settle this—whatever this may be—

Might I suggest the sauna?

It’s completely empty, by the way.

Wink. Wonk.
